revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:March 26 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of March 26 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦3月26日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[正元]]元年（[[1259年]]_月_日） - 正元に改元 * （[[1390年]]_月_日） - 北朝が明徳に改元 * [[文政]]12年（[[1829年]]_月_日） - シーボルト事件に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]]に改めて死刑判決 * [[慶応]]3年（[[1867年]]_月_日） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「開陽丸」が横浜に到着
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[延徳]]元年（[[1489年]]_月_日） - [[足利義尚]]、[[室町幕府]]9代将軍（* [[1465年]]） * [[正保]]3年（[[1646年]]_月_日） - [[柳生宗矩]]、剣術家・[[柳生三厳]]（十兵衛）の父（* [[1571年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月25日 (旧暦)|3月25日]] 翌日[[3月27日 (旧暦)|3月27日]] - 前月[[2月26日 (旧暦)|2月26日]] 翌月[[4月26日 (旧暦)|4月26日]] *新暦[[3月26日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月26日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1259年]][[4月20日]]） - [[正嘉]]より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]]元年/[[元中]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1390年]][[4月12日]]） - 北朝が[[康応]]より明徳に改元 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[4月29日]]） - [[シーボルト事件]]に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]]に改めて死刑判決 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]]」が横浜に到着
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[延徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1489年]][[4月26日]]） - [[足利義尚]]、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1465年]]） * [[正保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1646年]][[5月11日]]） - [[柳生宗矩]]、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]]の父（* [[1571年]]） <!--* [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1784年]][[5月15日]]） - [[田沼意知]]、江戸幕府[[若年寄]]・[[田沼意次]]の子（* [[1749年]]）（[[4月3日 (旧暦)|4月3日]]説あり）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月26日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1259年]][[4月20日]]） - [[正嘉]]より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]]元年/[[元中]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1390年]][[4月12日]]） - 北朝が[[康応]]より明徳に改元 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[4月29日]]） - [[シーボルト事件]]に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]]に改めて死刑判決 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]]」が横浜に到着
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[延徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1489年]][[4月26日]]） - [[足利義尚]]{{要出典|date=2021-04}}、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1465年]]） * [[正保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1646年]][[5月11日]]） - [[柳生宗矩]]、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]]の父（* [[1571年]]） <!--* [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1784年]][[5月15日]]） - [[田沼意知]]、江戸幕府[[若年寄]]・[[田沼意次]]の子（* [[1749年]]）（[[4月3日 (旧暦)|4月3日]]説あり）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[4月20日]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[元中]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[4月12日]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[4月29日]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[4月30日]] ） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[延徳]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[4月26日]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[5月11日]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

[[sn:March 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[元中]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[延徳]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[元中]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府がオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[延徳]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May qq]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "江戸幕府" to "Tokugawa shogunate"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[元中]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[延徳]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[Genchū]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[Entoku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

[[sn:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[Genchū]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[Entoku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、剣術家・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

[[sn:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[Genchū]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[Entoku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、Kenjutsu・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] [[zh:三月廿六]] [[en:draft:March 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[Genchū]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[Entoku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、Kenjutsu・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1259]] [[April 20]] ） - [[正嘉]] より正元に[[改元]] * [[明徳]] 1st year/[[Genchū]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1390]] [[April 12]] ） - 北朝が[[康応]] より明徳に改元 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[April 29]] ） - [[シーボルト事件]] に関連して投獄され獄死していた[[高橋景保]] に改めて死刑判決 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateがオランダに発注していた蒸気軍艦「[[開陽丸]] 」が横浜に到着
== Births == {{Expand section}}
== Deaths == * [[Entoku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1489]] [[April 26]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1465]] ） * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[May 11]] ） - [[柳生宗矩]] 、Kenjutsu・[[柳生三厳|柳生三厳（十兵衛）]] の父（* [[1571]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|qq=|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|qq=|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|qq=|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿六]]
{{translated page|ja|3月26日 (旧暦)|version=83645002|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1259|1259]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Shōka (era)|Shōka]] to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1390|1390]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōō|Kōō]] to [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]]. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “[[:en:Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|Kaiyōmaru]]” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * [[:en:Entoku|Entoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1489|1489]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1465|1465]])<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – [[:en:Yagyū Munenori|Yagyū Munenori]], a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1571|1571]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838851]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1259|en|1259|WD=Q5507|lt=1259}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōka (era)|en|Shōka (era)|WD=Q1327489|lt=Shōka}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}} 1st year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1390|en|1390|WD=Q6375|lt=1390}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|WD=Q1146172|lt=Kōō}} to {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “{{ill|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|en|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|WD=Q3005167|lt=Kaiyōmaru}}” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|WD=Q431465|lt=Entoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465}})<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munenori|en|Yagyū Munenori|WD=Q631099|lt=Yagyū Munenori}}, a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1259|en|1259|WD=Q5507|lt=1259}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōka (era)|en|Shōka (era)|WD=Q1327489|lt=Shōka}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}} 1st year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1390|en|1390|WD=Q6375|lt=1390}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|WD=Q1146172|lt=Kōō}} to {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “{{ill|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|en|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|WD=Q3005167|lt=Kaiyōmaru}}” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|WD=Q431465|lt=Entoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465}})<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munenori|en|Yagyū Munenori|WD=Q631099|lt=Yagyū Munenori}}, a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿六]][[zh:三月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 26|qq=March 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1259|en|1259|WD=Q5507|lt=1259}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōka (era)|en|Shōka (era)|WD=Q1327489|lt=Shōka}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Shōgen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}} 1st year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1390|en|1390|WD=Q6375|lt=1390}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|WD=Q1146172|lt=Kōō}} to {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “{{ill|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|en|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|WD=Q3005167|lt=Kaiyōmaru}}” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|WD=Q431465|lt=Entoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465}})<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munenori|en|Yagyū Munenori|WD=Q631099|lt=Yagyū Munenori}}, a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|25|3|27|2|26|4|3|0326|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Q11123303|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1259|en|1259|WD=Q5507|lt=1259|1=1259}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōka (era)|en|Shōka (era)|WD=Q1327489|lt=Shōka|1=Shōka (era)}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgen|1=Q11123303|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123303}}. * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} 1st year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1390|en|1390|WD=Q6375|lt=1390|1=1390}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|WD=Q1146172|lt=Kōō|1=Kōō}} to {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}}) – In connection with the Siebold incident, a new death sentence was pronounced against {{ill|Takahashi Kageyasu|ja|高橋景保|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Kageyasu|1=Takahashi Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11671324}}, who had been imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate received the steam warship “{{ill|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|en|Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru|WD=Q3005167|lt=Kaiyōmaru|1=Japanese frigate Kaiyō Maru}}” on order from the Netherlands.
== Births == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|WD=Q431465|lt=Entoku|1=Entoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu|1=Ashikaga Yoshihisa}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465|1=1465}})<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munenori|en|Yagyū Munenori|WD=Q631099|lt=Yagyū Munenori|1=Yagyū Munenori}}, a Kenjutsu master and father of {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳（十兵衛）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}}).
